---
title: "\'The Fairy of the Sands (translated from the French - Paul Feval)"
---

## \'The Fairy of the Sands (translated from the French - Paul Feval)

**Author:** Frances Mary Yonge
**Imprint:** <i>MP</i> (July 1867-June 1868)

### Notes

This appeared without FMY\'s name but CMY refers to her as the translator.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
